programme.desc: Renowned hunter Mark Kayser faces one of his most challenging hunts yet in the sparse woodlands of Nebraska.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: Embark on a journey through Scotland's hunting traditions, exploring bird shoots, grouse moors, and red stag hunts while discovering the evolving role of hunting in conservation.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Grouper and Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell
programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take Sergeant Major Jamey Caldwell fishing out of Hawks Cay for some grouper and tarpon action.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Night Vision Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell
programme.desc: Sergeant Major Jamey Caldwell brings some game-changing technology along as he joins Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor for some nighttime tarpon fishing at the Long Key Bridge.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Dolphin and Swordfish with Sam Milazzo
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Sam Milazzo to find the elusive daytime swordfish but run into some great dolphin fishing on the way.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Fly Fishing Tour of the Keys
programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor patiently pursue big tarpon from the Everglades to the Middle Keys with fly rod in hand.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Richard Black for an exciting adventure in Key Largo, catching a wide variety of fish species on the shallow reef.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Jeff Malone to find a frenzy of exciting bluefish near Marathon, Fla.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Tournament angler Blair Wiggins of "Addictive Fishing" continues his fishing adventures but also shares his love of everything outdoors, including hunting, cooking, beekeeping and more.

programme.title: We Caught That
programme.desc: Capt. Jason Dozier is a full-time fishing and hunting guide passionate about putting friends and clients on anything that can be caught or harvested from or near the water; it's time to showcase these adventures.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The crew makes it to the Bahamas and the incredible Green Turtle Club for a week of fishing, diving, and exploring the Abaco Island chain; they make the 200 mile crossings from Miami and Cape Canaveral to rendezvous at Green Turtle Cay.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Green Turtle Cay adventure continues as the LK crew uncovers more of what the incredible out islands of the Bahamas have to offer.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Back in San Diego and with rockfish on the mind, the crew fish new grounds and depths to catch Southern California bottom fish; pro snowboarder and friend Dave Downing joins to round out the rock cod fishing trip.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Ali and Rush take advantage of the many other opportunities this time of year has to offer and switch focus back to the basics, targeting smaller yellowfin, bluefin, and mahi on bait.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor use Lowrance Active Target all day to locate fish, first targeting bridge tarpon, followed by unearthing a variety of species in Florida Bay's mullet muds.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor chase tarpon of all sizes around Florida Bay and throughout the Everglades.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Learning the fundamentals of flats fishing and the advanced tactics used by proven tournament anglers.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA heads to Jupiter to fish with Ryan Nitz for giant snook.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Focusing on the culture of fishing, as seen through the viewpoints of two drastically different fishermen.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Focusing on the culture of fishing, as seen through the viewpoints of two drastically different fishermen.

programme.title: Sail Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse LeBoeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.

programme.title: The Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captain Jonathan Moss is fishing one of his favorite Central Florida Lakes for Largemouth Bass!

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - Can You Forage, Fish & Feast Like a Local in Seattle in 48 Hours?

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc: Get a rare look inside The Explorers Club headquarters; for the last 120 years, The Explorers Club has been the exclusive epicenter where legendary explorers come together to share some of the most incredible adventure stories ever told.

programme.title: The Direction
programme.desc: Professional angler, Andrew Nordbye, for a cold day on Guntersville to catch some giant crappie; traveling through a major winter storm and arriving at an abandoned lake was the not-surprising scene for the day; Andrew's priorities are in order.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.sub-title: Reef Dropping and Diving for All
programme.desc: We follow along as collaborative agencies create, deliver and sink a new reef much to the delight of divers and anglers; Adapt-Able Scuba makes underwater adventure possible to those who didn't think it was.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Meredith learns the value of the Trash Can Slam on a flounder trip with Capt. Justin that turns into a multi-species challenge.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin Leake and Meredith McCord divert attention from what's not happening with the tarpon bite to using CoastMaster, light tackle and experience to find snapper success on heavily fished public spots.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: When the Bay Point Billfish Open returns, the crew hops on board the Ellie B for some offshore competition and follows the event's dockside party.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: Exploring New Zealand's Wild Flavors, Māori Culture & Volcanic Hot Spring Cooking
programme.desc: They say you come to New Zealand as a stranger, but leave as family. In this episode of DIRT, the crew goes full circle-meeting Muttonbird chefs Emma and George on the South Island before hopping up to Raglan and working their way back down.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation
programme.desc: Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's, addresses the care of natural resources for future generations; Ziehmer asserts it is the responsibility of citizens to leave resources in better condition for the future.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: A peaceful day of reef fishing in Islamorada turns into a kingfish and yellowtail frenzy for Captains Scott and Steve.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: It only takes three fish to fill the Yeti cooler when Capt. Scott kite fishes the top for wahoo and Steve pulls a big mutton snapper off the bottom.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve take a long run into the Gulf from Stock Island to load their coolers with cobia and huge yellowtail snapper.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve sail west of Key West to battle with big kingfish and end up with plenty of meat for the smoker.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Key West Yellowtail and Cero on Fly

programme.title: Into the Blue

programme.title: Destination Dive

programme.desc: Capt. Danny Allen shares his adventures and tips while he visits Florida's historical fishing destinations.
